creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
During port install, I receive this error message:

[...]
/usr/bin/touch /usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gdalplugins/.keepme
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/gdal-1.11.0/GDALmake.opt /usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/stage/usr/local/share/gdal/
/usr/bin/strip /usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/stage/usr/local/bin/* /usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libgdal.so.19
/usr/bin/strip: /usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/stage/usr/local/bin/gdal-config: File format not recognized
*** Error code 1 (ignored)
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
